jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
jobs.content: <p><strong>Enterprise Account Executive</strong></p><p>Chainguard is the container-image + supply-chain-security platform pioneered around distroless-Wolfi-OS-images & SBOM-attestation.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (Experience)
jobs.content: <p>Lead Chainguard's Developer Enablement function across the Images / Enforce / Wolfi OS stack.</p>
